ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (buy/sell) */,
  "pos_side" TEXT /* Position side (long/short) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (entry/close) */,
  "qty" REAL /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and loss for the trade */,
  "fee_paid" REAL /* Fees paid for the trade */,
  "long_pos_size" REAL /* Current size of the long position */,
  "long_pos_price" REAL /* Current price of the long position */,
  "shrt_pos_size" REAL /* Current size of the short position */,
  "shrt_pos_price" REAL /* Current price of the short position */,
  "liq_diff" REAL /* Difference from liquidation price */,
  "equity" REAL /* Current equity level */,
  "pnl_plus_fees_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative PnL plus fees */,
  "loss_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative loss */,
  "profit_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative profit */,
  "fee_paid_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative fees paid */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance */,
  "liq_price" REAL /* Current liquidation price */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the trade */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Drawdown of the portfolio */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the portfolio */,
  "n_days" INTEGER /* Number of days since the start of the trading period */,
  "average_daily_gain" REAL /* Average daily gain of the portfolio */,
  "hours_since_long_pos_change" REAL /* Hours since the last long position change */,
  "hours_since_shrt_pos_change" REAL /* Hours since the last short position change */,
  "hours_since_pos_change_max" REAL /* Maximum hours since the last position change */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used for the trade */,
  "trade_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trades" (
  "user_trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-trade relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "equity" REAL /* Current equity level of the portfolio */,
  "long_pos_size" REAL /* Current size of the long position */,
  "long_pos_price" REAL /* Current price of the long position */,
  "shrt_pos_size" REAL /* Current size of the short position */,
  "shrt_pos_price" REAL /* Current price of the short position */,
  "liq_price" REAL /* Current liquidation price */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance */,
  "margin_level" REAL /* Current margin level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pnl_plus_fees_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative PnL plus fees */,
  "loss_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative loss */,
  "profit_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative profit */,
  "fee_paid_cumsum" REAL /* Cumulative fees paid */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Drawdown of the portfolio */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the portfolio */,
  "average_daily_gain" REAL /* Average daily gain of the portfolio */,
  "n_days" INTEGER /* Number of days since the start of the trading period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "pos_side" TEXT /* Position side (long/short) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the position */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the position */,
  "liq_diff" REAL /* Difference from liquidation price */,
  "hours_since_pos_change" REAL /* Hours since the last position change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_metrics" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "liq_price" REAL /* Current liquidation price */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the portfolio */,
  "hours_since_pos_change_max" REAL /* Maximum hours since the last position change */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at risk (VaR) of the portfolio */,
  "expected_shortfall" REAL /* Expected shortfall (ES) of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market condition */,
  "market_index" REAL /* Market index value */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether email notifications are enabled */,
  "sms_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether SMS notifications are enabled */,
  "alert_thresholds" TEXT /* Alert thresholds for various metrics */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of the strategy (e.g., mean reversion, momentum) */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameters of the strategy (e.g., lookback period, threshold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtest_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the strategy during the backtest period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the strategy during the backtest period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the strategy during the backtest period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument being traded (e.g., stock, future) */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the order (buy/sell) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, cancelled) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
